expectations.evidence: Uses sys.path.insert for ~/scripts and imports send_notification from notify

expectations.text: Uses Pushover as the notification backend (not just macOS notifications)
expectations.evidence: Uses send_notification() from notify.py with Pushover as primary backend via env vars

expectations.text: Sends notification with the filename included in the message
expectations.evidence: Notification message is f'{name} - {size}' including the filename

expectations.text: Sets an appropriate priority level (0 or 1 for file monitoring)
Reads PUSHOVER_USER_KEY and PUSHOVER_APP_TOKEN from environment
expectations.evidence: Explains that notify.py reads PUSHOVER_USER_KEY and PUSHOVER_APP_TOKEN from ecosystem.env
